narrative:
Windsor Twp. township has 1,315 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.2 percentage points.
